items.title: Man arrested for alleged voyeurism in Callaway, blames 'crackhead'
items.dek: Deputies said he then told them that “a crackhead came over, took my phone, took pictures, and brought my phone back.” submitted by /u/GetOffMyGrassBrats [link]
items.body: Deputies said he then told them that “a crackhead came over, took my phone, took pictures, and brought my phone back.” submitted by /u/GetOffMyGrassBrats [link] [comments]

items.title: Two Cuba-bound aid ships found days after disappearing
items.dek: The crew are safe and will complete their mission, a spokesman for the organisers said.
items.body: The crew are safe and will complete their mission, a spokesman for the organisers said.
